# ORBFORGE - Wranngle Agent Avatar Maker

> ORBFORGE is a free WebGL avatar synthesizer by Wranngle Systems. Tune 40 parameters — texture styles, 3D lighting, volumetric cores, tracers, seeded randomize, preset overlays — and export an animated WebP or GIF for use as an AI agent avatar. It runs entirely in the browser — no login or account required.

## App

- [ORBFORGE](https://orbforge.wranngle.com): the synthesizer, with live preview, presets, and JSON config import/export
- [Source repository](https://github.com/wranngle/ORBFORGE): source, tests, and the OG-card generator

## Company

- [Wranngle Systems](https://wranngle.com): AI voice agents, workflow automation, and business websites
- [Full LLM context](https://wranngle.com/llms-full.txt): canonical single-fetch context for Wranngle Systems and founder Cody Arnold
